name: Volsinii, Siracusa - Il Siracusano - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) !!!BETA VERSION 1.1!!! (Warning, this bot has a very high base token count [about 4k base, which grows quickly when the story picks up] so I strongly recommend using a proxy, Openrouter/Chutes offers free Deepseek models)

Il Siracusano, the entire thing, all the characters, locations, and a bunch of different starting messages for any character you might want to play as. Currently a WIP, will include starting messages for every faction in the story.

V1.1 - Intros for Famiglia Saluzzo and Penguin Logistics have been added! New lorebook for the races of Terra has been added!

Current factions are

The Grey Hall -

Signora Sicilia

Father Agenir

Benthonexigios (Ben, simply)

Danbrown Leopardi
